name: Webhook Burst Protection Rate Limit
objective: Rate limit high-volume webhook bursts on internet-facing callback endpoints to reduce replay floods and unauthenticated abuse.
risk_mitigated: Webhook endpoint flooding, callback replay storms, and denial of service against asynchronous processing paths.
potential_side_effects: Legitimate provider retries can arrive in bursts during upstream incidents, especially from payment and messaging platforms.
tuning_notes: Set provider-specific exceptions only after measuring normal retry behavior. Keep trusted provider IPs and signatures outside the rate limit where supported by your architecture.
deployment_notes: Start in log mode and scope the rule to callback paths such as /webhooks and /callbacks. Move to managed challenge or block only after understanding provider retry patterns and signature validation coverage.
monitoring_notes: Monitor bursts by path, ASN, and response status. Correlate Cloudflare events with application-side signature verification failures and queue latency spikes.
